message:
test(wait): add integration tests for quiescence and condition polling

Adds three integration tests to the wait module:

- quiescence_producer_consumer_eventually_quiet: Simulates a
  producer/consumer pattern where a consumer drains work items
  at 5ms intervals. Verifies wait_for detects quiescence after
  the queue empties.

- quiescence_with_shared_state_and_quiet_window: Uses shared
  Mutex<QuiescenceState> to simulate work draining with a 10ms
  quiet window. Verifies the quiescence checker observes both
  zero pending work and elapsed quiet window.

- wait_for_condition_on_changing_source: Monitors a monotonically
  increasing atomic counter and waits for threshold (>= 7).
  Validates wait_for_condition handles overshoot between polls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
